task.goal: Go to https://www.ubereats.com/, if prompted enter the delivery address '<ADDRESS>', search for pizza, open a plausible first restaurant result, add a pizza to the cart if possible, proceed as far toward checkout as possible without placing any order, and report exactly this JSON: {"status":"success","restaurant_name":"<name>","item_name":"<item or unknown>","reached_checkout":true,"checkout_signal":"<evidence or unknown>"}. If location, login, or site friction blocks progress, return {"status":"error","error":"<what blocked progress>"}.
